free_text: Search for an Energy Dependence in the 235U Delayed
Neutron Spectra
235U-lined hemispherical chamber.
NE-912 6Li glass detector and BC-501
liquid scintillators used.
the uncertainties in the measurements
were approximately +- 10% of the spectrum yield over
most of the 150- to 600-keV region where the majority
of the DN counts reside
Data taken from Appendix B of thesis.
No reply received from W.Schier to author proof.
SD: REACTION code and data units in
Subent 2 changed. BIB update.
To normalize a pair of spectra (see REL-REF), a ratio
of gamma peak areas was taken, since the gamma peak and
the neutron 'peak' scaled together. (The vertical yield
scale and horizontal lO-keV neutron energy bin size are
consistent with the eight DN spectra normalized to
10**4 counts presented in the NSE,94,353,1986
- data
used for comparison
